channel.title: CyberTender Radar
channel.description: Daily ranked cyber and IT public-sector opportunities.

item.title: National Cybersecurity Preparedness Consortium
item.description: Department of Homeland Security - FEMA | Grant value varies | deadline 2026-07-31. Matches cyber, cybersecurity; deadline in 25 days.

item.title: CyberNext: Advance Cybersecurity and AI Readiness
item.description: U.S. Mission to Albania | Grant value varies | deadline Not specified. Matches cyber, cybersecurity.

item.title: Cybersecurity Innovation for Cyberinfrastructure
item.description: U.S. National Science Foundation | Grant value varies | deadline 2027-01-20. Matches cyber, cybersecurity; deadline in 198 days.
